product.title: Foundation for Older Women | Warm - Perfectfor Light/Medium Complexions | Mushroom Head Air Cushion CC Cream - BB Cream Foundation Makeup Moisturizing Concealer Long-Lasting Full Coverage
featureBullets: Gentle for Mature & Sensitive Skin: Designed for sensitive, dry, or mature skin, this cushion foundation with Hyaluronic Acid and Dimethicone creates a smooth, moisturizing base that helps prevent caking or creasing

Warm – Golden-Tone Match: A great fit for medium skin with warm, golden, or olive undertones. This shade helps create a more even, refreshed look—especially in areas where the skin appears slightly deeper in tone
Hydrating Skincare-Infused Formula: Infused with moisture-locking Hyaluronic Acid to keep skin comfortable, supple, and hydrated all day, maintaining a fresh and healthy-looking complexion

Lightweight, Natural Coverage: Lightweight, buildable cushion formula that blends seamlessly for smooth, natural-looking coverage—blurring fine lines and uneven texture without feeling heavy, greasy, or cakey
Effortless Application for Everyday Use: Comes with a soft mushroom puff for smooth, even application in seconds—perfect for quick touch-ups and creating a flawless daily makeup look with ease

specification.value: #39,970 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #354 in Foundation Makeup
Fragrance Free, Paraben Free, Alcohol Free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers give mixed feedback about the foundation's coverage, with some finding it excellent while others say it doesn't provide full coverage as advertised. The texture receives mixed reviews, with some finding it weightless while others say it's extremely heavy on the skin. While the application is easy for some, others find it hard to apply. The applicator and color match get mixed reactions, with some praising the mushroom applicator and great color match, while others express dissatisfaction. The foundation receives positive feedback for its natural clean look, but customers disagree on its durability and value for money, with several considering it not worth the price.

reviews.reviewTitle: 80 yr old, finally found a foundation me "mature" skin.
reviews.reviewText: I am surprised! I'm 80 years old and with the changes in my skin in the last few years, Ive looked for a foundation that doesn't either make me look like a clown or doesn't cover those imperfections we all have at this age. This is a delightful surprise...feels almost moist as it goes on...strange. Have to get use to the "dabbing" done with the applicator - I've never had a foundation applied that way but it works really well to go back over and cover discolorations (not perfectly, but better). Definitely worth a try.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It sat in my pores. My mushroom applicator was broken. It was hard to get out of container, very creamy, and hard to apply. Very disappointed in this product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: It's okay but not sure it's worth the price
reviews.reviewText: Not sure why all the hype but it's ok. Feels lightweight but when you go to take it off, you see how much was actually on your face. Coverage was good and since I also use a setting spray, it stays on for a long time. I recommend only using it sparingly as it will transfer to clothing, or a tissue if you blow your nose. Keeping to have as backup.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 17, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I've never worn face makeup because it's so thick and looks unnatural. Hush is light and blends in with my skin color. It evens out any discoloration and I don't feel or see any makeup., yet I look better!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 3, 2026

reviews.reviewText: The color was not what the order showed - the brush they came with it is a joke - it doesn’t cover as well as they say in their advertising
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 17, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This makeup is no different than any other makeup. Definitely didn’t give the coverage that was advertised. Will not be reordering. Gave it a 2 for ease of application and the color match was good.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 9, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It works just like they say. I love the sponge applicator. It’s not quite a powder and not a liquid it’s in between the two which I love. Did not look dry on my face or cakey. It was what I hoped it would be. Worth the money. Will last a long time
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 23, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Easy application. Great coverage. Smudge proof
reviews.reviewText: Love this makeup. Brush and compact make easy application. Coverage is great. Does not rub off.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 25, 2026
